message:
fix(stream): re-arm debounce timer when custom clock lags wall clock

When the wall-clock Sleep timer fires but time_getter reports the
debounce period hasn't elapsed, the timer was cleared and Poll::Pending
returned with no wake source. If the upstream stream stays Pending, the
buffered item is stranded. Fix: re-arm a new timer for the remaining
duration so there is always a wake source.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
